tables.description: This sample attributes data table includes sample/tissue type, analyte type, cell type, tumor status, and year sample was collected for the 450K analysis.

variables.name: CELL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell type or subtype of collected sample

variables.name: COLLECTION_YEAR
variables.description: Timepoint of sample collection for 450K microarray

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of sample/tissue collected for 450K analysis

variables.name: SENTRIX_ID
variables.description: Sample identifier - Unique barcode position for sample on 450K microarray chip

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent information, and subject's biological sex.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs known as Sentrix IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SENTRIX_ID
variables.description: Sample identifier - Unique barcode for each sample on 450K microarray
